name: @dantecode/danteforge
description: DanteForge quality verification engine — PDSE scoring, anti-stub enforcement, constitution checker

scripts.build: node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('src/index.ts')){console.log('Binary dist — skipping build');process.exit(0)}process.exit(1)" || tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts
scripts.lint: node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('src/index.ts')){console.log('Binary dist — skipping lint');process.exit(0)}process.exit(1)" || eslint src/
scripts.test: node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('src/index.ts')){console.log('Binary dist — skipping tests');process.exit(0)}process.exit(1)" || vitest run --config ../../vitest.package.config.ts --passWithNoTests
